---
title: "td_purrr"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{td_purrr}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(squirrels)
```

<!-- WARNING - This vignette is generated by {fusen} from dev/flat_read_multiple_data.Rmd: do not edit by hand -->

# read_multiple_data

```{r examples-read_multiple_data}
library(purrr)
tabs <- read_multiple_data(path = system.file(package = "squirrels"))


ttt <- tabs |>
  map(nrow)

unlist(ttt["19"])

ttt["19"]
ttt[["19"]]


tabs |>
  compact() |>
  map(nrow)

```
